expected.notes: The required action is supported but no deadline may be invented.

proposal.explanation: The document asks the recipient to submit proof of current student status through the council upload page. It explicitly states that no deadline is given; a personal target date would not be an official deadline.
proposal.requiredAction: Provide proof of your current student status using the council upload page.
completionCriteria: Later evidence from the council upload page confirms that proof of current student status was uploaded.
